name: Fermented River Style
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Weightless Soul
granted_abilities.text: This model has +2 Sp and may not be moved by enemy effects. If this model is not a master, discard this upgrade after resolving an action which dealt damage to this model.

granted_abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
granted_abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

extraction_notes: The 'Butterfly Jump' ability has a shield icon (warding) next to its name.
Limitations section shows a single dash '-' indicating no restrictions.
